name: agent-collab-skills
description: Multi-agent collaboration skills for Claude Code — task splitter, output reconciler, debate, shared memory, acceptance gate. Composes with codex-delegate / gemini-delegate.

metadata.description: Practical skills for orchestrating Claude + Codex + Gemini on the same task without losing state, missing conflicts, or merging unverified output.

plugins.name: agent-collab-workspace
plugins.description: 5 multi-agent collaboration skills auto-discovered from the source repo's skills/ subdirectory: agent-task-splitter, agent-output-reconciler, agent-debate, agent-shared-memory, agent-acceptance-gate.
